channel.title: File-Sharing on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in File-Sharing on Arrans github.io

item.title: cloudreve/cloudreve
item.description: 🌩 Self-hosted file management and sharing system, supports multiple storage providers

item.title: schollz/croc
item.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: 9001/copyparty
item.description: Portable file server with accelerated resumable uploads, dedup, WebDAV, SFTP, FTP, TFTP, zeroconf, media indexer, thumbnails++ all in one file

item.title: kyantech/Palmr
item.description: 🌴 Palmr. is an open-source file-sharing platform focused on privacy and security. It enables users to upload, manage, and share files with features like password protection, custom links, and access control without tracking or limitations. Designed for seamless and secure sharing, Palmr. is completely free.
